description: An all-time favourite accessory, belts form an integral part of dressing. This signature belt from puma is set to pump up your style and add zing to your attire.. Length 95 cm Made of leather for absolute durability, comfort and style Shimmery outer for glamorous look Metal buckle for perfect customsied Fit Brand name embossed on the inside Care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
